product: Genie knowledge store enhancements and benchmark improvements
tagline: Easier benchmark generation: + Space editors can save representative messages or SQL answers from chat conversations to benchmark questions.
what_it_does: Easier benchmark generation: + Space editors can save representative messages or SQL answers from chat conversations to benchmark questions. + Space editors can generate benchmark SQL answers after entering a benchmark text question. + Accurate Genie answers from one benchmark result can now be saved to update future benchmark sets.
why_it_matters: Improved performance and latency: Genie's internal reasoning process has been simplified, slightly improving overall latency and streamlining context for SQL generation.

capabilities.title: Space editors can generate benchmark
capabilities.desc: Space editors can generate benchmark SQL answers after entering a benchmark text question. See Add benchmark questions.

capabilities.title: Accurate Genie answers from one

capabilities.title: Click Submit and try again
capabilities.desc: Click Submit and try again to regenerate the response using the provided feedback.

key_takeaway: Easier benchmark generation: + Space editors can save representative messages or SQL answers from chat conversations to benchmark questions.
